name: Knight of the Sea
descriptionTemplate: When commanding ship units, morale will not diminish. When dealing a naval critical attack, increase damage by X%. If a friendly carrier within 2 hexes or if the commander is deployed on a carrier, air strikes, missiles, and nuclear bombs deals +30% damage. All friendly aircraft carriers within 2 hexes gain +15% air strike damage.

progression.renderedDesc: When commanding ship units, morale will not diminish. When dealing a naval critical attack, increase damage by 8%. If a friendly carrier within 2 hexes or if the commander is deployed on a carrier, air strikes, missiles, and nuclear bombs deals +30% damage. All friendly aircraft carriers within 2 hexes gain +15% air strike damage.
